recommendations.title: Psycho
recommendations.overview: When larcenous real estate clerk Marion Crane goes on the lam with a wad of cash and hopes of starting a new life, she ends up at the notorious Bates Motel, where manager Norman Bates cares for his housebound mother.

recommendations.title: The Rage: Carrie 2
recommendations.overview: A horrible massacre strikes up after an outcast teenage girl is taunted by a group of high school jocks, all of them unaware of her cutthroat telekinetic powers.

recommendations.title: Poison Ivy
recommendations.overview: A seductive teen befriends an introverted high school student and schemes her way into the lives of her wealthy family.

recommendations.title: Rescued by Ruby
recommendations.overview: Chasing his dream to join an elite K-9 unit, a state trooper partners with a fellow underdog: clever but naughty shelter pup Ruby. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Megaboa
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: On a trip to Colombia, a group of college students encounter a fifty-foot boa constrictor, hungry for blood.

recommendations.title: Nancy Drew and the Hidden Staircase
recommendations.overview: Nancy Drew, a smart high schooler with a penchant for keen observation and deduction, stumbles upon the haunting of a local home. A bit of an outsider struggling to fit into her new surroundings, Nancy and her pals set out to solve the mystery, make

recommendations.title: Psycho II
recommendations.overview: Norman Bates is declared sane and released from the facility in which he was being held, despite the complaints of Lila Loomis, sister of his most famous victim. Is he really cured, or will he kill again?

recommendations.title: Psycho
recommendations.overview: A young female embezzler arrives at the Bates Motel, which has terrible secrets of its own.

recommendations.title: Colors of Evil: Red
recommendations.overview: When a girl's body is found on a beach in Poland's Tricity, a prosecutor teams up with the victim's mother on an impassioned quest for the truth.

recommendations.title: Sleepy Hollow
recommendations.overview: Skeptical young detective Ichabod Crane gets transferred to the hamlet of Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he is tasked with investigating the decapitations of three people – murders the townsfolk attribute to a legendary specter, The Headless Horseman
